sample_prompts: mirror the left side to the right
copy one side to the other
mirror one creature ear to the other side
keep the low poly animal face symmetric
copy the paw shape from left to right

direction.description: Which side to copy FROM and TO

threshold.description: Distance threshold for merging mirrored vertices

description: Makes mesh symmetric by mirroring one side to the other, useful for creature ears, paws, and face blockout symmetry.
